titleStmt.title: SII 22.380: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 380. (A.R. No. 380 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. MĒLAIKKŌYIL-ROCK-CUT TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. MĀR. TRIBH. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA I—21 + 1st YEAR (A.D. 1236-37).

summary.p: This records a similar sale of another piece of land, 5 mā in extent, in the same village, by the Ūrār and temple trustees to Umaiyāḻvi Periyanāchchi. In this case they also agreed to pay the kīḻiṟai on the land on behalf of the purchaser for an additional sum of money received by thēm. It is possible that Periyanāchchi was the mother of Duggai mentioned in No. 379 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ ciri coṇāṭu koṇ
ṭaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1- vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kunṟucūḻnāṭṭu meṉ
maṉainallūr Ūrāy Icainta Ūromum Uṭaiyār tiruvikkiramacoḻiśvara muṭaiyanāyaṉār
koyiṟtāṉattomum tirunalakkuṉṟattu tevar Aṭiyāḷ Umaiyāḻvi periyanāccikku Āka
caṇṭecuratevar Aruḷāl nāṅkaḷ kalveṭṭik kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉ ṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam
tāḷappeṟṟāṉ kuṭikkāṭukku Ellai Āvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Apaiyaṉ kāṭaṉ puñcaikku
meṟkum teṟku Ellai vāyttalaikku vaṭakkum meṟku Ellai karai nallūr Ellaikkuk ki
ḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Āṟṟukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa
nilam5pa Iṉnilam Aiñcu māvukkum vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu koṇṭa paḻaṅkācu I
ṉṉila mañcumāvil nāvicaṉ paṟṟāl ṉiṅkiṉa kkāṇi karutta vaṉ kuṭṭai koṇṭa
paḻaṅkācu 5kkū6 Ākap paḻaṅkācu 3 10 5- m Āī6- m Ipaḻaṅkācum Iṉnel
lum poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Iṉilattukku māttāl kaṭamaik kālāl Aḷakkakkaṭava I9 100m
māttāl kiḻiṟai paḻaṅkācu 2 10 1 titamum 5 10 2� tiramam Iṟukkakkaṭava paḻaṉaṟ (?)
māpāttu koḷḷakkaṭavomākavum Ūrpuḷḷi pāttukkoḷḷa kaṭavomākavum Ippa
ṭi cammatittu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom muṉ collappaṭṭa Ivvaṉai vom Umaiyāḻvi periya
ṉāccikku nāṭu meṉmaṉainallūr pantaikoṇṭa tāḷappeṟṟāṉ kuṭikkāṭu nāṉ viṟṟu po
Ippaṭikku Ālāla cuntarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu tillaināyakapaṭṭan Eḻuttu
toḻaṉ Eḻuttu piramaṉ Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu coḷamān tiyākipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ikkuṭikkāṭu Antarāyam periyaṉāṭṭu
veḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.380 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
